name: @studio/core
comment: Shipped as SOURCE (no build step) — each app's Vite/TanStack transpiles it. Runtime deps are declared here so pnpm hoists them; the exports map mirrors today's @/* subfolders so import rewrites are mechanical. Fill `dependencies` from the current hermes-studio package.json during the Phase 1 move (react, react-dom, @tanstack/*, @supabase/*, zustand, lucide-react, clsx, tailwind-merge, marked, etc.).
